case_title: AETNA FINANCE COMPANY, INC DBA ITT FINANCIAL VS ROSELADA FRANCISCO B.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AETNA FINANCE COMPANY, INC DBA ITT FINANCIAL SERVICES (SF1) AS TO DEFENDANT ROSELADA FRANCISCO B. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-17-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
